title: CMF Editor Session State
description: Tracks editor UI state for a single video editing session — undo/redo stack depth, playhead, panel layout, auto-save metadata. Used by FR-VID-10 Zustand store and IndexedDB persistence.

video_id.description: ID of the video being edited.

pipeline_id.description: Pipeline instance that produced this video.

manifest_version.description: Version counter for the manifest. Increments on every save to backend. Used for conflict detection.

opened_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the editor session started.

last_save_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last explicit save to backend. Null if never saved.

last_auto_save_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last auto-save to IndexedDB. Null if auto-save not yet triggered.

undo_stack_depth.description: Number of manifest snapshots in the undo stack. Max 50.

redo_stack_depth.description: Number of manifest snapshots in the redo stack.

selected_beat_index.description: Index of the currently selected beat in the timeline. Null if no beat selected.

selected_track.description: Currently active track in the timeline.

zoom_level.description: Timeline zoom level. 1.0 = default. Higher = more zoomed in.

inspector_visible.description: Whether the Inspector panel (center-right) is visible.

review_panel_visible.description: Whether the Review panel (right sidebar) is visible.

copilot_visible.description: Whether the AI Copilot panel is visible.

timeline_height_px.description: Height of the timeline panel in pixels.

dirty.description: True if the manifest has unsaved changes since last backend save.

auto_save_enabled.description: Whether auto-save to IndexedDB is active.
